  column-gap: 2rem;

.columns p {

}

.columns h2 {
  background-color: #ccc;
  break-inside: avoid; /* Prevents the background of the block element from breaking unto two columns */
  break-before: column; /* Makes sure the header is not shown at the end of a column */
}

.columns .quote {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  column-span: all;
}
